input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 3.0.16 tests reference an internal utility package that is absent in 3.1.0; tests should use supported Janino APIs or the new commons-compiler package if they intentionally cover Iterables.

Janino can compile and attempt to load generated classes at runtime; native-image execution may expose dynamic class-loading limitations, so local Gradle/Native Image verification remains authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0 declares commons-compiler as a normal transitive dependency, Janino is used in-process as an embedded Java compiler/evaluator, and the javac failure comes from a test importing the old 3.0.x internal package org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables, which moved to org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator in 3.1.0.
